name: VSFP-Butterfly
description: FRET-based voltage indicator with a novel 'Butterfly' topology sandwiching the voltage-sensing domain between two fluorescent proteins.

dynamicRangeData.note: Brain slices, layer 2/3 pyramidal neurons, 12 cells

photostabilityData.note: Approximated from mCitrine donor FP in vitro t1/2=3.3min at 35 mW/mm² white light

brightnessData.source: EC×QY: mCitrine EC=77000, QY=0.76 vs EGFP EC=56000, QY=0.60
